old_value: {"id":"wai-ptzf","title":"feat(reflect): add write_reflect_resource() function","description":"Add `write_reflect_resource(project_root: \u0026Path, project_name: \u0026str, content: \u0026str, handoff_count: usize) -\u003e Result\u003c()\u003e` to `src/commands/reflect.rs`.
